import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Tap Edit at (17.9%, 52.6%)"):
        actions.tap_within_element(AppiumBy.ACCESSIBILITY_ID, 'Edit', 17.9, 52.6, container_by=AppiumBy.XPATH, container_value='//XCUIElementTypeOther[@name="LauncherProViewController"]/XCUIElementTypeScrollView', container_w=320, container_h=539)
    assert True

import pytest
from appium.webdriver.common.appiumby import AppiumBy
from reportportal_client import step

from driver.driver_actions import DriverActions


@pytest.mark.name("test_case")
def test_test_case(actions: DriverActions):
    with step("[Action] Drag //XCUIElementTypeImage (72.9%,75.9%) → //XCUIElementTypeOther (81.9%,76.3%)"):
        actions.drag_within_elements(AppiumBy.XPATH, '//XCUIElementTypeImage', 72.9, 75.9, AppiumBy.XPATH, '//XCUIElementTypeOther', 81.9, 76.3, duration=1.0)
    assert True
